input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.4.2
            TITLE: the portion of the fuel filler neck nearest to the fuel filler cap must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.4.2: The portion of the Fuel Filler Neck nearest to the Fuel Filler cap must be:
IC.5.4.2 The portion of the Fuel Filler Neck nearest to the Fuel Filler cap must be: 
a. Minimum 125 mm vertical height above the top level of the Fuel Tank 
b. Angled no more than 30° from the vertical

final_answer: IC.5.4.2 The portion of the Fuel Filler Neck nearest to the Fuel Filler cap must be: a. Minimum 125 mm vertical height above the top level of the Fuel Tank b. Angled no more than 30° from the vertical
